metadata.preview:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
selected=`cat ~/.tmux-cht-languages ~/.tmux-cht-command | fzf`
if [[ -z $selected ]]; then
    exit 0
fi

read -p "Enter Query: " query

if grep -qs "$selected" ~/.tmux-cht-languages; then
    query=`echo $query | tr ' ' '+'`
    tmux neww bash -c "echo \"curl cht.sh/$selected/$query/\" & curl cht.sh/$selected/$query & while [ : ]; do sleep 1; done"
else
    tmux neww bash -c "curl -s cht.sh/$selected~$query | less"
fi

state.title: home/scripts/tmux-cht.sh

23: # shellcheck disable=SC2039
24: [[ $0 == - ]] && return
25: 
26: __fzf_git_color() {
27:   if [[ -n $NO_COLOR ]]; then
28:     echo never
29:   elif [[ $# -gt 0 ]] && [[ -n $FZF_GIT_PREVIEW_COLOR ]]; then
30:     echo "$FZF_GIT_PREVIEW_COLOR"
31:   else
32:     echo "${FZF_GIT_COLOR:-always}"
33:   fi
34: }
35: 
36: __fzf_git_cat() {
37:   if [[ -n $FZF_GIT_CAT ]]; then
38:     echo "$FZF_GIT_CAT"
39:     return
40:   fi
41: 
42:   # Sometimes bat is installed as batcat
43:   _fzf_git_bat_options="--style='${BAT_STYLE:-full}' --color=$(__fzf_git_color .) --pager=never"
44:   if command -v batcat > /dev/null; then
45:     echo "batcat $_fzf_git_bat_options"
46:   elif command -v bat > /dev/null; then
47:     echo "bat $_fzf_git_bat_options"
48:   else
49:     echo cat
50:   fi
51: }
52: 
53: __fzf_git_pager() {
54:   local pager
55:   pager="${FZF_GIT_PAGER:-${GIT_PAGER:-$(git config --get core.pager 2> /dev/null)}}"
56:   echo "${pager:-cat}"
57: }
58: 
59: if [[ $1 == --list ]]; then
60:   shift
61:   if [[ $# -eq 1 ]]; then
62:     branches() {
63:       git branch "$@" --sort=-committerdate --sort=-HEAD --format=$'%(HEAD) %(color:yellow)%(refname:short) %(color:green)(%(committerdate:relative))\t%(color:blue)%(subject)%(color:reset)' --color=$(__fzf_git_color) | column -ts$'\t'
64:     }
65:     refs() {
66:       git for-each-ref "$@" --sort=-creatordate --sort=-HEAD --color=$(__fzf_git_color) --format=$'%(if:equals=refs/remotes)%(refname:rstrip=-2)%(then)%(color:magenta)remote-branch%(else)%(if:equals=refs/heads)%(refname:rstrip=-2)%(then)%(color:brightgreen)branch%(else)%(if:equals=refs/tags)%(refname:rstrip=-2)%(then)%(color:brightcyan)tag%(else)%(if:equals=refs/stash)%(refname:rstrip=-2)%(then)%(color:brightred)stash%(else)%(color:white)%(refname:rstrip=-2)%(end)%(end)%(end)%(end)\t%(color:yellow)%(refname:short) %(color:green)(%(creatordate:relative))\t%(color:blue)%(subject)%(color:reset)' | column -ts$'\t'
67:     }
68:     hashes() {
69:       git log --date=short --format="%C(green)%C(bold)%cd %C(auto)%h%d %s (%an)" --graph --color=$(__fzf_git_color) "$@" $LIST_OPTS
70:     }
71:     case "$1" in
72:       branches)
73:         echo 'CTRL-O (open in browser) ╱ ALT-A (show all branches)'
74:         echo 'ALT-H (list commit hashes)'
75:         branches
76:         ;;
77:       all-branches)
78:         echo 'CTRL-O (open in browser) ╱ ALT-ENTER (accept without remote)'
79:         echo 'ALT-H (list commit hashes)'
80:         branches -a
81:         ;;
82:       hashes)
83:         echo 'CTRL-O (open in browser) ╱ CTRL-D (diff) ╱ CTRL-S (toggle sort)'
84:         echo 'ALT-R (toggle raw mode) ╱ ALT-F (list files) ╱ ALT-A (show all hashes)'
85:         hashes
86:         ;;
87:       all-hashes)
88:         echo 'CTRL-O (open in browser) ╱ CTRL-D (diff)'
89:         echo 'CTRL-S (toggle sort) ╱ ALT-F (list files)'
90:         hashes --all
91:         ;;
92:       refs)
93:         echo 'CTRL-O (open in browser) ╱ ALT-E (examine in editor) ╱ ALT-A (show all refs)'
94:         refs --exclude='refs/remotes'
95:         ;;
96:       all-refs)
97:         echo 'CTRL-O (open in browser) ╱ ALT-E (examine in editor) ╱ ALT-ENTER (accept without remote)'
98:         refs
99:         ;;
100:       *) exit 1 ;;
101:     esac
102:   elif [[ $# -gt 1 ]]; then
103:     set -e
104: 
105:     branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2> /dev/null)
106:     if [[ $branch == HEAD ]]; then
107:       branch=$(git describe --exact-match --tags 2> /dev/null || git rev-parse --short HEAD)
108:     fi
109: 
110:     # Only supports GitHub for now
111:     case "$1" in
112:       commit)
113:         hash=$(grep -o "[a-f0-9]\{7,\}" <<< "$2" | head -n 1)
114:         path=/commit/$hash
115:         ;;
116:       branch|remote-branch)
117:         branch=$(sed 's/^[* ]*//' <<< "$2" | cut -d' ' -f1)
118:         remote=$(git config branch."${branch}".remote || echo 'origin')
119:         branch=${branch#$remote/}
120:         path=/tree/$branch
121:         ;;
122:       remote)
123:         remote=$2
124:         path=/tree/$branch
125:         ;;
126:       file) path=/blob/$branch/$(git rev-parse --show-prefix)$2 ;;
127:       tag)  path=/releases/tag/$2 ;;
128:       *)    exit 1 ;;
129:     esac
130: 
131:     remote=${remote:-$(git config branch."${branch}".remote || echo 'origin')}
132:     remote_url=$(git remote get-url "$remote" 2> /dev/null || echo "$remote")
133: 
134:     if [[ $remote_url =~ ^git@ ]]; then
135:       url=${remote_url%.git}
136:       url=${url#git@}
137:       url=https://${url/://}
138:     elif [[ $remote_url =~ ^http ]]; then
139:       url=${remote_url%.git}
140:     fi
141: 
142:     case "$OSTYPE" in
143:       darwin*)
144:         open "$url$path"
145:         ;;
146:       msys)
147:         # Git-Bash on Windows
148:         start "$url$path"
149:         ;;
150:       linux*)
151:         # Handle WSL on Windows
152:         if uname -a | grep -i -q Microsoft && command -v powershell.exe; then
153:           powershell.exe -NoProfile start "$url$path"
154:         else
155:           xdg-open "$url$path"
156:         fi
157:         ;;
158:       *)
159:         # fall back to xdg-open for BSDs, etc.
160:         xdg-open "$url$path"
161:         ;;
162:     esac
163:     exit 0
164:   fi
165: fi
166: 
167: if [[ $- =~ i ]] || [[ $1 = --run ]]; then # ----------------------------------
168: 
169: if [[ $__fzf_git_fzf ]]; then
170:   eval "$__fzf_git_fzf"
171: else
172:   # Redefine this function to change the options
173:   _fzf_git_fzf() {
174:     fzf --height 50% --tmux 90%,70% \
175:       --layout reverse --multi --min-height 20+ --border \
176:       --no-separator --header-border horizontal \
177:       --border-label-pos 2 \
178:       --color 'label:blue' \
179:       --preview-window 'right,50%' --preview-border line \
180:       --bind 'ctrl-/:change-preview-window(down,50%|hidden|)' "$@"
181:   }
182: fi
183: 
184: _fzf_git_check() {
185:   git rev-parse > /dev/null 2>&1 && return
186: 
187:   [[ -n $TMUX ]] && tmux display-message "Not in a git repository"
188:   return 1
189: }
190: 
191: __fzf_git=${BASH_SOURCE[0]:-${(%):-%x}}
192: __fzf_git=$(readlink -f "$__fzf_git" 2> /dev/null || /usr/bin/ruby --disable-gems -e 'puts File.expand_path(ARGV.first)' "$__fzf_git" 2> /dev/null)
193: 
194: _fzf_git_files() {
195:   _fzf_git_check || return
196:   local root query extract_file_name
197:   root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
198:   [[ -n "$(git rev-parse --show-prefix)" ]] && query='!../ '
199: 
200:   read -r -d "" extract_file_name <<'EOF'
201: "$(cut -c4- <<< {} | sed 's/.* -> //;s/^"//;s/"$//;s/\\"/"/g')"
202: EOF
203: 
204:   (
205:     git -c core.quotePath=false -c color.status=$(__fzf_git_color) status --short --no-branch --untracked-files=all
206:     git -c core.quotePath=false ls-files "$root" | grep -vxFf <(
207:       git -c core.quotePath=false status --short --untracked-files=no |
208:         cut -c4- | sed -e 's/.* -> //' -e '/^"[^"\\]*"$/ { s/^"//;s/"$//; }'
209:       echo :
210:     ) | sed 's/^/   /'
211:   ) |
212:     _fzf_git_fzf -m --ansi --nth 2..,.. \
213:       --border-label '📁 Files ' \
214:       --header 'CTRL-O (open in browser) ╱ ALT-E (open in editor)' \
215:       --bind "ctrl-o:execute-silent:bash \"$__fzf_git\" --list file $extract_file_name" \
216:       --bind "alt-e:execute:${EDITOR:-vim} $extract_file_name" \
217:       --query "$query" \
218:       --preview "git -c core.quotePath=false diff --no-ext-diff --color=$(__fzf_git_color .) -- $extract_file_name | $(__fzf_git_pager); $(__fzf_git_cat) $extract_file_name" "$@" |
219:     cut -c4- | sed 's/.* -> //'
220: }
221: 
222: _fzf_git_tree_files() {
223:   _fzf_git_check || return
224: 
225:   local treeish
226:   for treeish in "$@"; do
227:     git diff-tree --no-commit-id --name-only "$treeish" -r
228:   done | sort -u |
229:     _fzf_git_fzf -m \
230:       --border-label "📂 Files in $* " \
231:       --header 'CTRL-O (open in browser) ╱ ALT-E (open in editor)' \
232:       --bind "ctrl-o:execute-silent:bash \"$__fzf_git\" --list file {}" \
233:       --bind "alt-e:execute:${EDITOR:-vim} {}" \
234:       --preview "git -c core.quotePath=false diff --no-ext-diff --color=$(__fzf_git_color .) -- {} | $(__fzf_git_pager); $(__fzf_git_cat) {}"
235: }
236: 
237: _fzf_git_branches() {
238:   _fzf_git_check || return
239: 
240:   local shell
241:   [[ -n ${BASH_VERSION:-} ]] && shell=bash || shell=zsh
242: 
243:   bash "$__fzf_git" --list branches |
244:   __fzf_git_fzf=$(declare -f _fzf_git_fzf) _fzf_git_fzf --ansi \
245:     --border-label '🌲 Branches ' \
246:     --header-lines 2 \
247:     --tiebreak begin \
248:     --preview-window down,border-top,40% \
249:     --color hl:underline,hl+:underline \
250:     --no-hscroll \
251:     --bind 'ctrl-/:change-preview-window(down,70%|hidden|)' \
252:     --bind "ctrl-o:execute-silent:bash \"$__fzf_git\" --list branch {}" \
253:     --bind "alt-a:change-border-label(🌳 All branches)+reload:bash \"$__fzf_git\" --list all-branches" \
254:     --bind "alt-h:become:LIST_OPTS=\$(cut -c3- <<< {} | cut -d' ' -f1) $shell \"$__fzf_git\" --run hashes" \
255:     --bind "alt-enter:become:printf '%s\n' {+} | cut -c3- | sed 's@[^/]*/@@'" \
256:     --preview "git log --oneline --graph --date=short --color=$(__fzf_git_color .) --pretty='format:%C(auto)%cd %h%d %s' \$(cut -c3- <<< {} | cut -d' ' -f1) --" "$@" |
257:   sed 's/^\* //' | awk '{print $1}' # Slightly modified to work with hashes as well
258: }
259: 
260: _fzf_git_tags() {
261:   _fzf_git_check || return
262:   git tag --sort -version:refname |
263:   _fzf_git_fzf --preview-window right,70% \
264:     --border-label '📛 Tags ' \
265:     --header 'CTRL-O (open in browser)' \
266:     --bind "ctrl-o:execute-silent:bash \"$__fzf_git\" --list tag {}" \
267:     --bind 'alt-r:toggle-raw' \
268:     --preview "git show --color=$(__fzf_git_color .) {} | $(__fzf_git_pager)" "$@"
269: }
270: 
271: _fzf_git_hashes() {
272:   _fzf_git_check || return
273:   bash "$__fzf_git" --list hashes |
274:   _fzf_git_fzf --ansi --no-sort --bind 'ctrl-s:toggle-sort,alt-r:toggle-raw' \
275:     --border-label '🍡 Hashes ' \
276:     --header-lines 2 \
277:     --bind "ctrl-o:execute-silent:bash \"$__fzf_git\" --list commit {}" \
278:     --bind "ctrl-d:execute:grep -o '[a-f0-9]\{7,\}' <<< {} | head -n 1 | xargs git diff --color=$(__fzf_git_color) > /dev/tty" \
279:     --bind "alt-a:change-border-label(🍇 All hashes)+reload:bash \"$__fzf_git\" --list all-hashes" \
280:     --bind "alt-f:become:echo ::tree_files;
281:       awk 'match(\$0, /[a-f0-9][a-f0-9][a-f0-9][a-f0-9][a-f0-9][a-f0-9][a-f0-9][a-f0-9]*/) { print substr(\$0, RSTART, RLENGTH) }' {+f} |
282:         xargs bash \"$__fzf_git\" --run tree_files" \
283:     --color hl:underline,hl+:underline \
284:     --preview "grep -o '[a-f0-9]\{7,\}' <<< {} | head -n 1 | xargs git show --color=$(__fzf_git_color .) | $(__fzf_git_pager)" "$@" |
285:   awk '
286:     NR==1 && $0=="::tree_files" {
287:       mode="tree_files"
288:       next
289:     }
290: 
291:     mode=="tree_files" {
292:       print
293:       next
294:     }
295: 
296:     match($0, /[a-f0-9][a-f0-9][a-f0-9][a-f0-9][a-f0-9][a-f0-9][a-f0-9][a-f0-9]*/) {
297:       print substr($0, RSTART, RLENGTH)
298:     }
299:   '
300: }
301: 
302: _fzf_git_remotes() {
303:   _fzf_git_check || return
304:   git remote -v | awk '{print $1 "\t" $2}' | uniq |
305:   _fzf_git_fzf --tac \
306:     --border-label '📡 Remotes ' \
307:     --header 'CTRL-O (open in browser)' \
308:     --bind "ctrl-o:execute-silent:bash \"$__fzf_git\" --list remote {1}" \
309:     --preview-window right,70% \
310:     --preview "git log --oneline --graph --date=short --color=$(__fzf_git_color .) --pretty='format:%C(auto)%cd %h%d %s' '{1}/$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)' --" "$@" |
311:   cut -d$'\t' -f1
312: }
313: 
314: _fzf_git_stashes() {
315:   _fzf_git_check || return
316:   git stash list | _fzf_git_fzf \
317:     --border-label '🥡 Stashes ' \
318:     --header 'CTRL-X (drop stash)' \
319:     --bind 'ctrl-x:reload(git stash drop -q {1}; git stash list)' \
320:     -d: --preview "git show --first-parent --color=$(__fzf_git_color .) {1} | $(__fzf_git_pager)" "$@" |
321:   cut -d: -f1
322: }
323: 
324: _fzf_git_lreflogs() {
325:   _fzf_git_check || return
326:   git reflog --color=$(__fzf_git_color) --format="%C(blue)%gD %C(yellow)%h%C(auto)%d %gs" | _fzf_git_fzf --ansi \
327:     --border-label '📒 Reflogs ' \
328:     --bind 'alt-r:toggle-raw' \
329:     --preview "git show --color=$(__fzf_git_color .) {1} | $(__fzf_git_pager)" "$@" |
330:   awk '{print $1}'
331: }
332: 
333: _fzf_git_each_ref() {
334:   _fzf_git_check || return
335:   bash "$__fzf_git" --list refs | _fzf_git_fzf --ansi \
336:     --nth 2,2.. \
337:     --tiebreak begin \
338:     --border-label '☘️  Each ref ' \
339:     --header-lines 1 \
340:     --preview-window down,border-top,40% \
341:     --color hl:underline,hl+:underline \
342:     --no-hscroll \
343:     --bind 'ctrl-/:change-preview-window(down,70%|hidden|)' \
344:     --bind "ctrl-o:execute-silent:bash \"$__fzf_git\" --list {1} {2}" \
345:     --bind "alt-e:execute:${EDITOR:-vim} <(git show {2}) < /dev/tty > /dev/tty" \
346:     --bind "alt-a:change-border-label(🍀 Every ref)+reload:bash \"$__fzf_git\" --list all-refs" \
347:     --bind "alt-enter:become:printf '%s\n' {+2} | sed 's@[^/]*/@@'" \
348:     --preview "git log --oneline --graph --date=short --color=$(__fzf_git_color .) --pretty='format:%C(auto)%cd %h%d %s' {2} --" \
349:     --accept-nth 2 \
350:     "$@"
351: }
352: 
353: _fzf_git_worktrees() {
354:   _fzf_git_check || return
355:   git worktree list | _fzf_git_fzf \
356:     --border-label '🌴 Worktrees ' \
357:     --header 'CTRL-X (remove worktree)' \
358:     --bind 'ctrl-x:reload(git worktree remove {1} > /dev/null; git worktree list)' \
359:     --preview "
360:       git -c color.status=$(__fzf_git_color .) -C {1} status --short --branch
361:       echo
362:       git log --oneline --graph --date=short --color=$(__fzf_git_color .) --pretty='format:%C(auto)%cd %h%d %s' {2} --
363:     " "$@" |
364:   awk '{print $1}'
365: }
366: 
367: _fzf_git_list_bindings() {
368:   cat <<'EOF'
369: 
370: CTRL-G ? to show this list
371: CTRL-G CTRL-F for Files
372: CTRL-G CTRL-B for Branches
373: CTRL-G CTRL-T for Tags
374: CTRL-G CTRL-R for Remotes
375: CTRL-G CTRL-H for commit Hashes
376: CTRL-G CTRL-S for Stashes
377: CTRL-G CTRL-L for reflogs
378: CTRL-G CTRL-W for Worktrees
379: CTRL-G CTRL-E for Each ref (git for-each-ref)
380: EOF
381: }
382: 
383: fi # --------------------------------------------------------------------------
384: 
385: if [[ $1 = --run ]]; then
386:   shift
387:   type=$1
388:   shift
389:   eval "_fzf_git_$type" "$@"
390: 
391: elif [[ $- =~ i ]]; then # ------------------------------------------------------
392: if [[ -n "${BASH_VERSION:-}" ]]; then
393:   __fzf_git_init() {
394:     bind -m emacs-standard '"\er":  redraw-current-line'
395:     bind -m emacs-standard '"\C-z": vi-editing-mode'
396:     bind -m vi-command     '"\C-z": emacs-editing-mode'
397:     bind -m vi-insert      '"\C-z": emacs-editing-mode'
398: 
399:     local o c
400:     for o in "$@"; do
401:       c=${o:0:1}
402:       if [[ $c == '?' ]]; then
403:         bind -x "\"\C-g$c\": _fzf_git_list_bindings"
404:         continue
405:       fi
406:       bind -m emacs-standard '"\C-g\C-'$c'": " \C-u \C-a\C-k`_fzf_git_'$o'`\e\C-e\C-y\C-a\C-y\ey\C-h\C-e\er \C-h"'
407:       bind -m vi-command     '"\C-g\C-'$c'": "\C-z\C-g\C-'$c'\C-z"'
408:       bind -m vi-insert      '"\C-g\C-'$c'": "\C-z\C-g\C-'$c'\C-z"'
409:       bind -m emacs-standard '"\C-g'$c'":    " \C-u \C-a\C-k`_fzf_git_'$o'`\e\C-e\C-y\C-a\C-y\ey\C-h\C-e\er \C-h"'
410:       bind -m vi-command     '"\C-g'$c'":    "\C-z\C-g'$c'\C-z"'
411:       bind -m vi-insert      '"\C-g'$c'":    "\C-z\C-g'$c'\C-z"'
412:     done
413:   }
414: elif [[ -n "${ZSH_VERSION:-}" ]]; then
415:   __fzf_git_join() {
416:     local item
417:     while read -r item; do
418:       echo -n -E "${(q)${(Q)item}} "
419:     done
420:   }
421: 
422:   __fzf_git_init() {
423:     setopt localoptions no_glob
424:     local m o
425:     for o in "$@"; do
426:       if [[ ${o[1]} == "?" ]];then
427:         eval "fzf-git-$o-widget() { zle -M '$(_fzf_git_list_bindings)' }"
428:       else
429:         eval "fzf-git-$o-widget() { local result=\$(_fzf_git_$o | __fzf_git_join); zle reset-prompt; LBUFFER+=\$result }"
430:       fi
431:       eval "zle -N fzf-git-$o-widget"
432:       for m in emacs vicmd viins; do
433:         eval "bindkey -M $m '^g^${o[1]}' fzf-git-$o-widget"
434:         eval "bindkey -M $m '^g${o[1]}' fzf-git-$o-widget"
435:       done
436:     done
437:   }
438: fi
439: __fzf_git_init files branches tags remotes hashes stashes lreflogs each_ref worktrees '?list_bindings'
440: 
441: fi # --------------------------------------------------------------------------

(End of file - total 441 lines)
</content>

parts.text: Let me provide a clear summary of what these scripts do and also check if there are other runnable scripts in the repo.

There are two main scripts in this environment:

**`home/scripts/tmux-cht.sh`** — Opens a tmux window with cheatsheets from [cht.sh](https://cht.sh). Uses `fzf` to pick a language/command from `~/.tmux-cht-languages` or `~/.tmux-cht-command`, then prompts for a query and fetches the result in a new tmux pane.

**`home/fzf-git.sh/fzf-git.sh`** — [fzf-git.sh](https://github.com/junegunn/fzf-git.sh) by Junegunn Choi. Provides interactive `fzf`-based widgets for Git, bound to `Ctrl-G` key combos:
- `Ctrl-G Ctrl-F` — browse/select files
- `Ctrl-G Ctrl-B` — browse branches
- `Ctrl-G Ctrl-T` — browse tags
- `Ctrl-G Ctrl-H` — browse commit hashes
- `Ctrl-G Ctrl-R` — browse remotes
- `Ctrl-G Ctrl-S` — browse stashes
- `Ctrl-G Ctrl-L` — browse reflog
- `Ctrl-G Ctrl-W` — browse worktrees
- `Ctrl-G Ctrl-E` — browse refs
- `Ctrl-G ?` — show all bindings

These are sourced (not executed directly) — they register keybindings in your shell.
